task: Produce an auditable, reproducible calibration-transfer analysis (workbook or script) using only the embedded packet. Deliver calibration_transfer.xlsx and lot_release_note.md containing traceable calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, explicit assumptions, validation checks, sensitivity analyses, and a final decision table. Follow named classification thresholds exactly; do not impute missing values or use outside data; remediation options may be combined only if total cost <= remediation_budget_usd. Flag needs_expert_review if any record's classification changes after a 5% sensitivity shift. Document every assumption and mark unresolved ambiguity as needs_review.
